source: https://github.com/ProjectNineveh/panel13 (Models/panel13.obj) -- re-fetched from original public CC-BY-4.0 repo, previous local source was producing the same content
note: Re-exported to fix mesh corruption: prior preview was decimated to 80000 faces under an old target, which fragmented the relief into 271 disconnected components (bratio 0.08). Source re-pulled fresh from ProjectNineveh GitHub repo; raw source is essentially clean (ncomp=3, 2 are 4-face noise specks) when faces are welded by position. Cleaned (dropped components <0.2% of total faces) and left undecimated since source faces (234870) < new 400k target. Result: ncomp=1, bratio=0.006.
